data.narrative: Chloé is a 31-year-old female working as a service or sales worker. They have vocational or technical level education and poor health. They live as: living with another family member. They own a car and a bike.

encounters.contact_narrative: Thomas is a 32-year-old male working as a craft or trades worker. They have vocational or technical level education and fair health. They live as: couple without children. They own a car.
